description_long: This object is a compact, portable music player with a square, metallic orange body and a circular control pad on its front face. Attached to the device is a pair of in-ear headphones with orange and white earbuds, connected by a thin white cable that includes an inline control module. The music player features a small display screen and a prominent circular button, likely for navigation and playback control. The device's design is reminiscent of early-generation MP3 players, with a clip on the back for attaching to clothing or accessories. The materials appear to be a combination of metal, plastic, and rubber, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel. This type of object is commonly used in urban environments for personal audio entertainment while on the move.
description: A compact, orange and white portable music player with attached in-ear headphones and a circular control pad. Features a small display and inline control module on the headphone cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular control pad, display, and both earbuds with the inline control module visible on the cable.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the music player, the display, and the cable layout with earbuds spread apart.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the player, cable routing, and both earbuds positioned in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the display and control pad visible, and the inline control module more prominently shown on the cable.
